sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116426" key="w)stismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠσ-τισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n116426.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὠθισμός</ref></xr>, Moer.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0562.tlg001:p.424P" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.424P.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
